# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_http_80
      address:
        socket_address:
          address: 0.0.0.0
          port_value: 80
      filter_chains:
        - filters:
            - name: envoy.filters.network.http_connection_manager
              typed_config:
                "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.network.http_connection_manager.v3.HttpConnectionManager
                stat_prefix: ingress_http
                codec_type: AUTO
                use_remote_address: true
                normalize_path: true
                merge_slashes: true
                route_config:
                  name: api_gateway_routes
                  virtual_hosts:
                    - name: api_gateway_vhost
                      domains:
                        - "*"
                      routes:
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/service-a/"
                          route:
                            cluster: service_a
                            prefix_rewrite: "/"
                            timeout: 30s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/service-b/"
                          route:
                            cluster: service_b
                            prefix_rewrite: "/"
                            timeout: 30s
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/health"
                          direct_response:
                            status: 200
                            body:
                              inline_string: "ok"
                        - match:
                            prefix: "/"
                          route:
                            cluster: default_backend
                            timeout: 30s
                http_filters:
                  - name: envoy.filters.http.router
                    typed_config:
                      "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.filters.http.router.v3.Router

  clusters:
    - name: service_a
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_a
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 100
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 1000
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 60

    - name: service_b
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: service_b
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 100
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 1000
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 60

    - name: default_backend
      type: STRICT_DNS
      connect_timeout: 5s
      lb_policy: ROUND_ROBIN
      load_assignment:
        cluster_name: default_backend
        endpoints:
          - lb_endpoints:
              - endpoint:
                  address:
                    socket_address:
                      address: default-backend.default.svc.cluster.local
                      port_value: 8080
      circuit_breakers:
        thresholds:
          - priority: DEFAULT
            max_connections: 100
            max_pending_requests: 1000
            max_requests: 1000
            max_retries: 3
      health_checks:
        - timeout: 2s
          interval: 10s
          unhealthy_threshold: 3
          healthy_threshold: 2
          http_health_check:
            path: /health
            expected_statuses:
              - start: 200
                end: 299
      typed_extension_protocol_options:
        envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions:
          "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.extensions.upstreams.http.v3.HttpProtocolOptions
          explicit_http_config:
            http2_protocol_options: {}
      upstream_connection_options:
        tcp_keepalive:
          keepalive_time: 300
          keepalive_interval: 60

admin:
  access_log_path: /tmp/envoy_admin_access.log
  address:
    socket_address:
      address: 0.0.0.0
      port_value: 9901
